Package microui.component

Class Knob

java.lang.Object
microui.core.base.View
microui.core.base.SpatialView
microui.core.base.ContentView
microui.core.base.Component
microui.core.RangeControl
microui.component.Knob
All Implemented Interfaces:
Scrollable, ValuePreviewSource, Visible
public final class Knob extends RangeControl
A graphical component for providing Knob

  • Constructor Details

    • Knob

      public Knob(float x, float y, float width, float height)
      Default constructor for initialization of bounds
      Parameters:
      x - position X
      y - position Y
      width - current width
      height - current height

    • Knob

      public Knob()
      Constructs with default bounds in center of screen

  • Method Details

    • getScaleColor

      public AbstractColor getScaleColor()
      Returns:
      color of scale

    • setScaleColor

      public void setScaleColor(AbstractColor scaleColor)
      Setter of scale color
      Parameters:
      scaleColor - current color of scale

    • setScaleColor

      public void setScaleColor(AbstractColor startColor, AbstractColor endColor)
      Setter of scale color with interpolation
      Parameters:
      startColor - current start color
      endColor - current end color

    • getHandleOffsetRatio

      public float getHandleOffsetRatio()
      Returns:
      value of ration by offset for handle

    • setHandleOffsetRatio

      public void setHandleOffsetRatio(float handleOffsetRatio)
      Setter for ratio of offset by handle
      Parameters:
      handleOffsetRatio - ratio of offset by handle

    • getHandleSizeRatio

      public float getHandleSizeRatio()
      Returns:
      ratio of size by handle

    • setHandleSizeRatio

      public void setHandleSizeRatio(float handleSizeRatio)
      Setter for ratio of size by handle
      Parameters:
      handleSizeRatio - current ratio of size by handle

    • getDefaultValue

      public Float getDefaultValue()
      Returns:
      default value if it's exist, but if it's not initialized, it's will return null

    • setDefaultValue

      public void setDefaultValue(float defaultValue)
      Sets the default value for the knob. When double clicked, the knob will reset to this value.
      Parameters:
      defaultValue - the default value, must be within min and max range.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if defaultValue is out of range.

    • getScaleWeightRatio

      public float getScaleWeightRatio()
      Returns the scale weight ratio, which controls the thickness of the scale arc.
      Returns:
      the scale weight ratio.

    • setScaleWeightRatio

      public void setScaleWeightRatio(float scaleWeightRatio)
      Sets the scale weight ratio. The ratio influences the stroke weight of the scale arc.
      Parameters:
      scaleWeightRatio - the ratio, must be between 0 and 2 (inclusive).
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the ratio is out of bounds.

    • getHandleColor

      public AbstractColor getHandleColor()
      Returns the color used for the handle.
      Returns:
      the handle color.

    • setHandleColor

      public void setHandleColor(AbstractColor handleColor)
      Sets the color for the handle.
      Parameters:
      handleColor - the new handle color, cannot be null.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if handleColor is null.

    • getStartAngle

      public float getStartAngle()
      Returns the start angle of the scale arc, in radians.
      Returns:
      the start angle.

    • setStartAngle

      public void setStartAngle(float startAngle)
      Sets the start angle of the scale arc.
      Parameters:
      startAngle - the start angle in radians, must be between 0 and TWO_PI and not greater than the current end angle.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the angle is invalid or exceeds the end angle.

    • getEndAngle

      public float getEndAngle()
      Returns the end angle of the scale arc, in radians.
      Returns:
      the end angle.

    • setEndAngle

      public void setEndAngle(float endAngle)
      Sets the end angle of the scale arc.
      Parameters:
      endAngle - the end angle in radians, must be between 0 and TWO_PI and not lower than the current start angle.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the angle is invalid or below the start angle.

    • setAngles

      public void setAngles(float startAngle, float endAngle)
      Sets both start and end angles of the scale arc.
      Parameters:
      startAngle - the start angle in radians, must be between 0 and TWO_PI.
      endAngle - the end angle in radians, must be between 0 and TWO_PI and greater than startAngle.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if either angle is invalid or if startAngle >= endAngle.

    • isContentPrepared

      public boolean isContentPrepared()
      Determines whether the component is ready to receive input. The knob is considered prepared if the mouse is inside its circular area, or if it is being dragged, or if internal scrolling is active.
      Returns:
      true if the knob should handle input, false otherwise.

    • mouseWheel

      public void mouseWheel(processing.event.MouseEvent mouseEvent)
      Handles mouse wheel events. If the mouse is inside the knob, scrolling is initiated.
      Parameters:
      mouseEvent - the mouse wheel event.
